title: Factored Form
aria_label: y equals a times, open parenthesis, x minus r-sub-1, close parenthesis, times, open parenthesis, x minus r-sub-2, close parenthesis
notes: Factored form reveals the zeros (x-intercepts) of the parabola directly: they are r₁ and r₂.
Set each factor equal to zero to find the roots: x − r₁ = 0 gives x = r₁.
The axis of symmetry is the average of the two roots: x = (r₁ + r₂) / 2.
If a quadratic cannot be factored over integers, use the quadratic formula instead.
a is the same leading coefficient as in standard and vertex form.

examples.description: Factor y = x² − 5x + 6 into factored form.

applications: Finding where a projectile lands (when height = 0).
Determining break-even points in revenue/cost models.
Solving quadratic equations by setting y = 0 and reading off roots.

es.title: Forma Factorizada
notes: La forma factorizada revela directamente los ceros (interceptos en x) de la parábola: son r₁ y r₂.
Iguala cada factor a cero para encontrar las raíces: x − r₁ = 0 da x = r₁.
El eje de simetría es el promedio de las dos raíces: x = (r₁ + r₂) / 2.
Si un cuadrático no se puede factorizar en enteros, usa la fórmula cuadrática.
a es el mismo coeficiente principal que en la forma estándar y la forma vértice.

ht.title: Fòm Faktorizasyon
notes: Fòm faktorizasyon montre zewo (entèsèpsyon-x) parabòl la dirèkteman: yo se r₁ ak r₂.
Mete chak faktè egal a zewo pou jwenn rasin yo: x − r₁ = 0 bay x = r₁.
Aks simetri a se mwayèn de rasin yo: x = (r₁ + r₂) / 2.
Si yon kwadratik pa ka faktorizasyon sou antye, itilize fòmil kwadratik la.
a se menm koefisyan prensip nan fòm estanda ak fòm vèrtèks.
